# Gateway TLS Certificate Directory

This directory holds the TLS certificates for the Suprema `device_gateway` (V1.8.0).
Certs are generated by `renew-certs.sh` — do NOT manually edit them.

## Files (auto-generated, gitignored except ca.crt)
- `ca.crt`         — CA root cert (committed; mounted into Docker containers)
- `ca_key.pem`     — CA private key (gitignored)
- `server.crt`     — Gateway server cert signed by CA (gitignored)
- `server_key.pem` — Server private key (gitignored)

## Renew certs (run when expired or after re-installing the binary)
```bash
sudo bash gateway-runtime/renew-certs.sh
docker compose up -d --force-recreate gsdk-sidecar backend
```

## Full health check
```bash
bash gateway-runtime/check-gateway.sh
```

## Re-install binary from scratch
```bash
# 1. Extract from Downloads archive:
7z e ~/Downloads/device_gateway_V1.8.0_20260310_repackage.7z device_gateway_linux_x64_V1.8.0_20260310.zip -o/tmp/gw/
unzip /tmp/gw/device_gateway_linux_x64_V1.8.0_20260310.zip -d /tmp/gw/bin/
cp /tmp/gw/bin/device_gateway_linux_x64 gateway-runtime/
cp /tmp/gw/bin/LICENSE.txt gateway-runtime/
# 2. Patch EULA and regenerate certs:
python3 gateway-runtime/patch-eula.py
sudo bash gateway-runtime/renew-certs.sh
# 3. Restart Docker:
docker compose up -d --force-recreate gsdk-sidecar backend
```
